requirement_topic.en: ENDE Grid Connection for BESS — 50 Hz System, IEC 62933, and Project-Specific Connection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: ENDE BESS并网——50 Hz系统、IEC 62933及项目专属并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: ENDE BESS併網——50 Hz系統、IEC 62933及項目專屬併網要求

summary.en: ENDE (Empresa Nacional de Distribuição de Electricidade) is Angola's national electricity distribution utility and the primary grid operator for distribution-connected BESS installations. IRSEA (Instituto Regulador do Sector Eléctrico de Angola) is the energy-sector regulator and must approve all licensed electricity generation and storage projects. Angola's national grid operates at 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase) at 50 Hz — the same nominal voltage and frequency as China's grid, meaning no fundamental voltage-level re-parameterisation is required for the PCS; however, local grid stability conditions, protection coordination settings, and ENDE connection agreement technical terms must still be confirmed project-by-project. The primary BESS deployment context in Angola is solar-plus-storage EPC projects financed by MCA (Millennium Challenge Account) and other development finance institutions, and hybrid mini-grid systems for rural electrification in interior provinces. BESS grid-connection technical requirements are defined in project-specific ENDE connection agreements and in EPC and lender specifications, which typically reference IEC 62933 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) series standards including IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based systems). A publicly accessible ENDE technical specification document specifically for BESS grid connection had not been confirmed from official public sources as of the dataset date; project-specific connection agreement terms must be obtained directly from ENDE and IRSEA.
summary.zh: ENDE（国家配电公司）是安哥拉国家配电公用事业，也是配电侧并网BESS装置的主要电网运营商。IRSEA（安哥拉电力行业监管研究所）是能源行业监管机构，须批准所有许可的电力发电和储能项目。安哥拉国家电网运行参数为220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）、50 Hz——与中国电网标称电压和频率相同，因此储能变流器（PCS）无需进行基本电压级别重新参数化；但仍须逐项目确认当地电网稳定条件、保护协调设定及ENDE并网协议技术条款。安哥拉主要的BESS部署场景是由MCA（千年挑战账户）和其他开发性金融机构资助的太阳能+储能EPC项目，以及内陆省份农村电气化混合微电网系统。BESS并网技术要求在项目专属ENDE并网协议及EPC和贷方规格中规定，通常引用IEC 62933（电化学储能系统）系列标准，包括IEC 62933-5-2（电化学系统安全要求）。截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方公开来源确认ENDE公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格文件；项目专属并网协议条款须直接向ENDE和IRSEA获取。
summary.zht: ENDE（國家配電公司）是安哥拉國家配電公用事業，也是配電側併網BESS裝置的主要電網運營商。IRSEA（安哥拉電力行業監管研究所）是能源行業監管機構，須批准所有許可的電力發電和儲能項目。安哥拉國家電網運行參數為220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）、50 Hz——與中國電網標稱電壓和頻率相同，因此儲能變流器（PCS）無需進行基本電壓級別重新參數化；但仍須逐項目確認當地電網穩定條件、保護協調設定及ENDE併網協議技術條款。安哥拉主要的BESS部署場景是由MCA（千年挑戰賬戶）和其他開發性金融機構資助的太陽能+儲能EPC項目，以及內陸省份農村電氣化混合微電網系統。BESS併網技術要求在項目專屬ENDE併網協議及EPC和貸方規格中規定，通常引用IEC 62933（電化學儲能系統）系列標準，包括IEC 62933-5-2（電化學系統安全要求）。截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方公開來源確認ENDE公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格文件；項目專屬併網協議條款須直接向ENDE和IRSEA獲取。

standards_or_laws: IRSEA — Instituto Regulador do Sector Eléctrico de Angola — energy-sector regulator; licensing and approval authority for all generation and storage installations in Angola
ENDE — Empresa Nacional de Distribuição de Electricidade — national distribution utility; grid-connection authority for distribution-connected BESS
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected EPC and lender project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected EPC and lender project-specification reference)

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid also operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V — the same nominal values as Angola — which means no voltage-level re-parameterisation is required for PCS hardware. However, Chinese GB/T grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals are not transferable to Angola and are not accepted by ENDE or IRSEA as meeting Angola's project-specific and regulatory grid-connection requirements.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2023（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网同样运行在50 Hz、220/380 V——与安哥拉标称值相同，因此PCS硬件无需电压级别重新参数化。然而，中国GB/T并网证书和NEA审批不可转用于安哥拉，不被ENDE或IRSEA接受为满足安哥拉项目专属和监管并网要求的依据。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2023（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網同樣運行在50 Hz、220/380 V——與安哥拉標稱值相同，因此PCS硬件無需電壓級別重新參數化。然而，中國GB/T併網證書和NEA審批不可轉用於安哥拉，不被ENDE或IRSEA接受為滿足安哥拉項目專屬和監管併網要求的依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy ENDE or IRSEA grid-connection and licensing requirements in Angola. Key points requiring attention: (a) voltage matching is favourable — Angola and China share the same 220/380 V, 50 Hz nominal grid parameters, so PCS hardware voltage-level re-parameterisation is not required; however, local grid stability, fault-level, and protection coordination conditions in Angola (especially at rural mini-grid sites) may differ from Chinese operating assumptions and require project-specific PCS configuration and testing; (b) IRSEA licensing — obtain IRSEA project approval and generation/storage licence before equipment procurement is finalised; (c) IEC 62933 series compliance — EPC and lender specifications typically require IEC 62933-2-1 and IEC 62933-5-2 evidence; Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent by development finance institutions or project owners; (d) communication and SCADA protocols — confirm ENDE's required interface protocol for BESS monitoring and dispatch control (IEC 61850, Modbus, or project-specific specification); (e) Portuguese documentation — all regulatory submissions and project connection documentation must be prepared in Portuguese.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足安哥拉ENDE或IRSEA并网和许可要求。需注意的要点：（a）电压匹配有利——安哥拉和中国电网标称参数相同（220/380 V、50 Hz），因此不需要PCS硬件电压级别重新参数化；但安哥拉当地（特别是农村微电网站点）的电网稳定性、故障水平和保护协调条件可能与中国运行假设不同，需要项目专属PCS配置和测试；（b）IRSEA许可——在设备采购最终确定前取得IRSEA项目批准和发电/储能许可证；（c）IEC 62933系列合规——EPC和贷方规格通常要求IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2证据；开发性金融机构或项目业主不接受中国GB/T标准为等效依据；（d）通信和SCADA协议——确认ENDE对BESS监控和调度控制所要求的接口协议（IEC 61850、Modbus或项目专属规格）；（e）葡萄牙语文件——所有监管提交文件和项目并网文件须以葡萄牙语编制。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足安哥拉ENDE或IRSEA併網和許可要求。需注意的要點：（a）電壓匹配有利——安哥拉和中國電網標稱參數相同（220/380 V、50 Hz），因此不需要PCS硬件電壓級別重新參數化；但安哥拉當地（特別是農村微電網站點）的電網穩定性、故障水平和保護協調條件可能與中國運行假設不同，需要項目專屬PCS配置和測試；（b）IRSEA許可——在設備採購最終確定前取得IRSEA項目批准和發電/儲能許可證；（c）IEC 62933系列合規——EPC和貸方規格通常要求IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2證據；開發性金融機構或項目業主不接受中國GB/T標準為等效依據；（d）通訊和SCADA協議——確認ENDE對BESS監控和調度控制所要求的接口協議（IEC 61850、Modbus或項目專屬規格）；（e）葡萄牙語文件——所有監管提交文件和項目併網文件須以葡萄牙語編制。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — IRSEA project licensing and ENDE grid-connection approval are required for all grid-connected BESS in Angola; technical requirements are project-specific and defined in ENDE connection agreements and EPC/lender specifications
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Angola

source.publisher: IRSEA — Instituto Regulador do Sector Eléctrico de Angola

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy Angola's ENDE grid-connection or IRSEA licensing requirements. Angola and China share the same 220/380 V, 50 Hz nominal grid parameters, which is a favourable alignment for PCS hardware; however, project-specific grid conditions at Angola rural mini-grid sites may require additional PCS configuration and testing. Engage IRSEA and ENDE at the earliest project stage to determine licensing requirements, connection agreement technical terms, applicable IEC 62933 evidence, and SCADA/communication protocol specifications. No publicly accessible ENDE technical specification specifically for BESS grid connection has been confirmed as of the dataset date — direct IRSEA and ENDE engagement is essential before equipment procurement is finalised. All regulatory submissions must be in Portuguese.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足安哥拉ENDE并网或IRSEA许可要求。安哥拉和中国共享相同的220/380 V、50 Hz标称电网参数，PCS硬件具有有利的匹配条件；但安哥拉农村微电网站点的项目专属电网条件可能需要额外的PCS配置和测试。应在项目最早阶段与IRSEA和ENDE接触，确定许可要求、并网协议技术条款、适用IEC 62933证据及SCADA/通信协议规格。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认ENDE公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格——在设备采购最终确定前，直接与IRSEA和ENDE接触至关重要。所有监管提交文件须以葡萄牙语编制。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足安哥拉ENDE併網或IRSEA許可要求。安哥拉和中國共享相同的220/380 V、50 Hz標稱電網參數，PCS硬件具有有利的匹配條件；但安哥拉農村微電網站點的項目專屬電網條件可能需要額外的PCS配置和測試。應在項目最早階段與IRSEA和ENDE接觸，確定許可要求、併網協議技術條款、適用IEC 62933證據及SCADA/通訊協議規格。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認ENDE公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格——在設備採購最終確定前，直接與IRSEA和ENDE接觸至關重要。所有監管提交文件須以葡萄牙語編制。
